nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Saffron-billed sparrow
nodes.summary: Saffron-billed sparrow（Saffron-billed sparrow，学名 Arremon flavirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。

links.evidence: The "gray-backed" subspecies is found further south, in central and southern Brazil, eastern Bolivia, much of Paraguay, and northeastern Argentina. The saffron-billed sparrow primarily inhabits tropical deciduous forest, both primary and second-growth
